scripts.worker:deploy: rm -rf /tmp/worker-deploy && mkdir -p /tmp/worker-deploy && cp wrangler.toml /tmp/worker-deploy/ && cp -r worker /tmp/worker-deploy/ && cp -r shared /tmp/worker-deploy/ && mkdir -p /tmp/worker-deploy/src && cp -r src/lib /tmp/worker-deploy/src/ && cd /tmp/worker-deploy && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run worker:deploy && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name christianmegle-web
